largest_gap_rank_row_label: Rank rows by the absolute length of the gray connector between the two dots. Which row has the {rank_phrase} gap?
Sort the rows by absolute dot-to-dot gap, ignoring which color is larger. Which row has the {rank_phrase} gap?

Compare all absolute dot-pair gaps. Which row is {rank_phrase} by gap size?
What row label has the {rank_phrase} absolute separation between its two dots?
smallest_gap_rank_row_label: Rank rows by the absolute length of the gray connector between the two dots. Which row has the {rank_phrase} gap?

series_a_greater_threshold_count: How many rows have "{winner_series}" at least {threshold_value} units greater than "{loser_series}"?
Count the rows where "{winner_series}" is to the right of "{loser_series}" by at least {threshold_value} units.
Using the horizontal axis, how many row pairs show "{winner_series}" exceeding "{loser_series}" by {threshold_value} or more?
How many rows have "{winner_series}" greater than "{loser_series}" by at least {threshold_value}?
How many categories satisfy: "{winner_series}" minus "{loser_series}" is at least {threshold_value}?
series_b_greater_threshold_count: How many rows have "{winner_series}" at least {threshold_value} units greater than "{loser_series}"?

How many categories satisfy: "{winner_series}" minus "{loser_series}" is at least {threshold_value}?
absolute_gap_at_least_threshold_count: How many rows have the two series separated by {gap_relation_phrase} {gap_threshold_value} units?
Count the row pairs whose absolute gap between the two dots is {gap_relation_phrase} {gap_threshold_value} units.
Using the shared horizontal axis, how many rows have a dot-to-dot separation {gap_relation_phrase} {gap_threshold_value}?
How many categories have the two series differing by {gap_relation_phrase} {gap_threshold_value} units?
How many dumbbell rows have an absolute difference {gap_relation_phrase} {gap_threshold_value}?

query:largest_gap_rank_row_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible row label as a string
query:largest_gap_rank_row_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one segment: two [x, y] pixel points formatted [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], using the two colored dot centers for the supporting row

query:smallest_gap_rank_row_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible row label as a string
query:smallest_gap_rank_row_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one segment: two [x, y] pixel points formatted [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], using the two colored dot centers for the supporting row

query:series_a_greater_threshold_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:series_a_greater_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a list of segments. Each segment is two [x, y] pixel points formatted [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], using the two colored dot centers for one row that satisfies the condition; use [] if no rows match

query:series_b_greater_threshold_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:series_b_greater_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a list of segments. Each segment is two [x, y] pixel points formatted [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], using the two colored dot centers for one row that satisfies the condition; use [] if no rows match

query:absolute_gap_at_least_threshold_co.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:absolute_gap_at_least_threshold_co.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a list of segments. Each segment is two [x, y] pixel points formatted [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], using the two colored dot centers for one row that satisfies the condition; use [] if no rows match

query:absolute_gap_at_most_threshold_cou.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:absolute_gap_at_most_threshold_cou.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a list of segments. Each segment is two [x, y] pixel points formatted [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], using the two colored dot centers for one row that satisfies the condition; use [] if no rows match
